name: workflow state contract three consultation lists standards pr_corpus and compliance default to empty arrays
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","standards_consulted":[],"pr_corpus_consulted":[],"compliance_consulted":[]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check consultations 2>out.txt && grep -q 'standards_consulted_count=0' out.txt && grep -q 'pr_corpus_consulted_count=0' out.txt && grep -q 'compliance_consulted_count=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
